items.name: utils
items.title: cn utility
items.description: clsx + tailwind-merge class merger used by every astro-shad component.

items.name: theme
items.title: astro-shad theme tokens
items.description: Three-layer token contract: shadcn slot vars, semantic utilities, slot-to-utility bridge. Neutral values -- override per brand.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: shadcn button converted to a self-contained .astro file. Renders <a> when href is given, <button> otherwise. Zero client JS.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: shadcn badge converted to a self-contained .astro file. Renders <a> when href is given, <span> otherwise. Zero client JS.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: shadcn card collapsed into one .astro file: title/description props plus header, default, and footer slots. Zero client JS.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: shadcn tabs with Radix replaced by minimal vanilla JS. Tabs declared as a prop, panels as named slots. Click + arrow-key activation, ARIA wired.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: shadcn accordion with Radix replaced by minimal vanilla JS. Accordion root + AccordionItem, single/multiple modes, CSS grid-rows height animation.

items.name: accordion-02
items.title: Accordion 02
items.description: Style variant of accordion: boxed -- each item is a separate rounded card with a gap. Same vanilla JS behaviour (single/multiple, grid-rows animation), fully self-contained.

items.name: accordion-03
items.title: Accordion 03
items.description: Style variant of accordion: flat divided list with an icon slot per item and swap-on-open chevrons. Same vanilla JS behaviour (single/multiple, grid-rows animation), fully self-contained.

items.name: glass-icon
items.title: Glass Icon
items.description: react-bits GlassIcons converted to a self-contained .astro tile: glass front, accent back plate (any CSS color, defaults to --primary), hover label. Zero client JS.

items.name: folder
items.title: Folder
items.description: react-bits Folder converted to CSS boxes + one delegated vanilla JS script: open/close toggle, fanning papers, cursor-magnet drift. Color via any CSS color prop.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: shadcn pagination as pure anchor markup -- page position is URL state, so zero client JS ships. Windowing math runs in frontmatter; icons are inline SVG.

items.name: bubble-menu
items.title: Bubble Menu
items.description: react-bits BubbleMenu minus react + gsap: staggered pill open/close via CSS transitions keyed off one data-state attribute, delays baked at build time. Per-item hover color prop.

items.name: form
items.title: Form
items.description: react-less counterpart of shadcn Form (react-hook-form + zod): native Constraint Validation API, validate-on-submit with reward-early revalidation, inline errors. Form + FormField.

items.name: date-picker
items.title: Date Picker
items.description: shadcn DatePicker without Popover/react-day-picker: real text input with a date pattern plus a vanilla JS month-grid popover. Follows the Form/FormField validation conventions.

items.name: magic-bento
items.title: Magic Bento
items.description: Bento layout grid + cell card. Zero JS: hover glow is a pure CSS keyframe gradient sweep (glow/glowColors props); cells size via span=default|wide|tall. MagicBento + BentoCard.

items.name: text-type
items.title: Text Type
items.description: react-bits TextType (typewriter) minus react: types, holds, deletes, cycles. First string server-rendered for no-JS/reduced-motion; caret rides currentColor.

items.name: rotating-text
items.title: Rotating Text
items.description: react-bits RotatingText minus react. ZERO client JS: per-instance keyframes generated in frontmatter, all words stacked in one inline-grid cell.

items.name: split-text
items.title: Split Text
items.description: react-bits SplitText minus react + gsap: the word/char split happens at build time in frontmatter; an IntersectionObserver flips one attribute and CSS staggers the reveal.

items.name: count-up
items.title: Count Up
items.description: react-bits CountUp minus react: final value server-rendered as real text; one rAF loop eases up from `from` when scrolled into view, formatted by Intl.NumberFormat.

items.name: curved-loop
items.title: Curved Loop
items.description: react-bits CurvedLoop minus react: marquee text on an SVG path via textPath startOffset, measured after document.fonts.ready. Experimental `path` prop accepts a custom SVG path.

items.name: top-bar
items.title: Top Bar
items.description: Full-width site header: edge-to-edge bar with bottom border, contained inner row, optional brand/nav/actions slots. Zero client JS. Sibling of floating-header.

items.name: floating-header
items.title: Floating Header
items.description: Floating site header: detached radius-adjustable pill (translucent card fill + blur) with brand/nav/actions slots. Zero client JS. Sibling of top-bar.

items.name: logo-loop
items.title: Logo Loop
items.description: react-bits LogoLoop minus react. ZERO client JS: classic duplicated-track CSS marquee with edge fade mask, speed/gap/pauseOnHover knobs.

items.name: hero-01
items.title: Hero 01 — centered
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero (min-h-svh), centered content stack + background slot. <Hero01 /> renders a complete block; customise by editing the installed copy (copy-and-own).

items.name: hero-02
items.title: Hero 02 — bottom-left
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero with content anchored bottom-left (editorial composition) + background slot for the full-bleed image. Customise by editing the installed copy.

items.name: hero-03
items.title: Hero 03 — centered + feature strip
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height centered hero with an auto-fit 3-4 column card strip anchored at the bottom edge + background slot. Customise by editing the installed copy.

items.name: split-01
items.title: Split 01 — media + content
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: normal-height half/half split, media placeholder surface beside the content stack (swap the div for your img/video), reverse prop flips sides at md+.

items.name: feature-grid-01
items.title: Feature Grid 01 — heading + card grid
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: centered heading block above a 3/4-column card grid (columns prop). Swap the demo Cards for your own cells; customise by editing the installed copy.

items.name: cta-01
items.title: CTA 01 — centered band
items.description: Layout section, ships populated: narrow centered call-to-action band on a card surface with an in-band background slot. Customise by editing the installed copy.
